--- revoke_on_all_change_streams_in_schema.sql
REVOKE SELECT ON ALL CHANGE STREAMS IN SCHEMA sch1, sch2 FROM ROLE r

--- AST
&ast.Revoke{
  Privilege: &ast.SelectPrivilegeOnAllChangeStreamsInSchema{
    Select:  7,
    Schemas: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 46,
            NameEnd: 50,
            Name:    "sch1",
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 52,
            NameEnd: 56,
            Name:    "sch2",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 67,
      NameEnd: 68,
      Name:    "r",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
REVOKE SELECT ON ALL CHANGE STREAMS IN SCHEMA sch1, sch2 FROM ROLE r
